package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoop() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_c_json_inside_stream_loop"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that call c.JSON(...) or c.PureJSON(...) from inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
